goal: Introduce plan-artifact/v1 for high-risk PR planning review.
scope: Add schema, generator, validator, policy-gate integration, and operator docs.

assumptions.text: Contributors can commit plan artifacts under artifacts/plan in the PR branch.
policy-gate runs after checkout and dependency installation, so validator execution is available.

rollbackPlan: Revert schema, scripts, workflow wiring, and docs for plan-artifact/v1.
notes: Change Package remains the after-change artifact; this artifact is for before-change review.
